name: Smash Box Golf
about: Smash Box Golf is a self-service, automated golf simulation studio located at the Shadelands Sports Mall. It offers a fully private Trackman bay accessible 24/7, allowing golfers to book a time, receive a secure access code, and unlock the door to practice or play on their own schedule. The facility is equipped with Trackman iO technology for real-time ball and club data, featuring over 250 iconic courses and tour-level analytics. Pricing is structured through memberships, flex passes, and hourly bookings, designed to be flexible without a long-term commitment.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to a fully private automated bay
Premium Trackman iO technology for real-time feedback and data
Flexibility in booking without a long-term membership commitment
Ability to bring your own food and drinks for a personalized experience

food_and_drink.notes: Golfers can bring their own food and beverage.
Golfers can bring their own alcohol.

simulator_hardware.notes: Fully automated private bay with tour-level ball and club data.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are required to bring your own clubs to use at Smash Box Golf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and beverages to enjoy during your session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies based on the number of players and pace, but sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is Smash Box Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise itself as kid-friendly, and the focus is on individual or small group practice and play.
